TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Kaheciday O niyaro' no 'Amis ko Kaheciday, o Paridaw a kasa'etal. Itiya ho, ira ko Raranges, Usod, Kakopa a ngangasawan mafolaw tayni tona Kaheciday a niyaro'. O kaitiraan a ngangan no hatini i, o He-pin-li i Posong.
S.PHON: kaħəʦiɬ~ɮaj o~u nijaro~uʡ no~u ʡamis ko~u kaħəʦiɬ~ɮaj, o~u pariɬ~ɮaw a kasaʡətaɾ. itija ħo~u, ira ko~u raraŋəs, o~u~uso~uɬ~ɮ, kako~upa a ŋaŋasawan mafo~uɾaw tajni to~una kaħəʦiɬ~ɮaj a nijaro~uʡ. o~u kaitiraan a ŋaŋan no~u ħatini i, o~u ħə-pin-ɾi i po~uso~uŋ.
S.FORM: Kaheciday O niyaro' no 'Amis ko Kaheciday, o Paridaw a kasa'etal. Itiya ho, ira ko Raranges, Usod, Kakopa a ngangasawan mafolaw tayni tona Kaheciday a niyaro'. O kaitiraan a ngangan no hatini i, o He-pin-li i Posong.
S.PHON: kaħəʦiɬ~ɮaj o~u nijaro~uʡ no~u ʡamis ko~u kaħəʦiɬ~ɮaj, o~u pariɬ~ɮaw a kasaʡətaɾ. itija ħo~u, ira ko~u raraŋəs, o~u~uso~uɬ~ɮ, kako~upa a ŋaŋasawan mafo~uɾaw tajni to~una kaħəʦiɬ~ɮaj a nijaro~uʡ. o~u kaitiraan a ŋaŋan no~u ħatini i, o~u ħə-pin-ɾi i po~uso~uŋ.
